is.t: 1. Navigate to https://cc.credovation.info/login 2. Wait for page to load 3. Observe all elements
Login page with email/password fields and submit button
Page loads with CredoOne logo, 'Super Admin Login' heading, email/password inputs, 'Force Login' button, dark theme
1. Leave email and password empty 2. Click 'Force Login'
HTML5 native validation tooltip: 'Please fill out this field' on email. Form does NOT submit.
1. Enter email: wrong@test.com 2. Leave password empty 3. Click 'Force Login'
Validation tooltip on password field. Form blocked.
Red error: 'Invalid Super Admin credentials'. Button shows 'Signing in...' briefly.
1. Enter ' OR 1=1 -- in both fields 2. Click 'Force Login'
Red error: 'Invalid Super Admin credentials'. No bypass.
'Signing in...' → redirect to /dashboard. Admin Dashboard loads.
1. Type in password field 2. Observe characters
Characters show as dots. Field type='password'.
1. Read subtitle text on login page
Subtitle reads 'Hardcoded Administrative Access' — exposes implementation detail
Button says 'Force Login' instead of 'Sign In'
No rate limiting on repeated failures
All attempts processed without throttling, CAPTCHA, or lockout.
1. Check login page for password recovery
No recovery option exists on login page.
1. Login and check cookies in DevTools 2. Check for adminToken cookie
HttpOnly cookie 'adminToken' set with bearer token. NOT accessible via JavaScript.
Returns 405 — properly blocks GET requests. Only POST accepted.
API login endpoint exists and is method-restricted
1. Login with valid credentials 2. Observe dashboard
Dashboard with stats and client data
'Admin Dashboard' heading loads with 4 stat cards and Recent Clients table.
Total Clients (blue), Completed (green), Inprogress (gold), Rejected (red). All show counts.
1. Click each stat card 2. Observe behavior
All 4 cards are visual only. No click handlers, no drill-down.
Table shows columns: Client, Access, Plan Type, Plan Start, Plan End, Status. Has real data rows.
Table column headers do NOT sort
No sorting on any column. No sort indicators.
Search input filters client list in real-time.
1. Check below table for page controls
1. Login footer: '© 2026 • Super Admin CVS' 2. Dashboard footer: '@Credovation Solutions Pvt.Ltd.'
1. Click red Logout button 2. Wait 3 seconds
Navigate to Onboarding Clients via sidebar
1. Click Services > KYC > Clients > Onboarding Clients
Page loads at /onboarding-clients with table showing existing clients and 'Add Client' button.
Columns: Client ID, Client Name, Access Details, Plan Type, Plan Start Date, Plan End Date, Due (days), Status, Actions
Form opens with fields: Client Name, Access Details, Plan Type (dropdown), Plan Start Date, Plan End Date. Client ID auto-generated.
1. Leave all fields empty 2. Click 'Add Client' submit button
Validation errors shown for required fields
Form submission blocked. Silent client-side validation prevents empty submission. No visible error messages displayed.
1. Enter Client Name: QA Test Client 2. Access Details: Tester 3. Plan Type: Silver 4. Plan Start: 2026-03-11 5. Plan End: 2026-04-11 6. Click 'Add Client'
Client added and appears in table
Client 'QA Test Client' successfully created. Appears in onboarding table with 'Inprogress' status and auto-generated Client ID.
1. Find client row in table 2. Click blue eye icon in Actions column
View modal opens displaying all client details: ID, Name, Access, Plan Type, Start/End dates, Status.
1. Click yellow/blue pen icon in Actions 2. Form opens with pre-filled data 3. Change Client Name to 'QA Test Client Edited' 4. Click Save
Edit form opens with pre-filled data. Name changed and saved. Table immediately reflects 'QA Test Client Edited'.
1. Check for red trash icon in Actions column
Red trash icon exists. Not clicked to preserve data for other tests.
1. Check Client ID column for newly created client
Format: CL-{timestamp} (e.g., CL-1773162129602). Unique per client.
Blue eye (View), Yellow pen (Edit), Red trash (Delete). Correct visual differentiation.
1. Click Services > KYC > Clients > Manage Clients
Manage Clients Dashboard loads with 3 charts and a searchable clients table at /manage-clients.
Pie chart with legend: Completed (green), Inprogress (yellow), Rejected (red). Shows actual data distribution.
Line chart showing Jan-Dec with data points. Spike visible in March area.
Bar chart with Silver, Gold, Platinum, Bronze categories.
Table correctly filters to show only 'QA Test Client Edited' matching record.
View and Edit icons trigger correct modals. Delete icon is present.
1. Add new client 2. Check if charts reflect new data
Charts reflect newly added clients. Pie chart shows updated status distribution.
Page at /payments/overall loads with 3 summary cards, search, filter, FY selector, and monthly audit table.
EXPECTED: ₹6Cr, COLLECTED: ₹4.77Cr, DUES: ₹1.23Cr. Cards have icons and proper formatting.
1. Click FY dropdown (top right) 2. Switch to 2027-2028
FY dropdown works. Data and audit table update for selected financial year.
Shows period row with APR-JAN columns. Green checkmarks for paid months, Red amounts for dues (₹48.2L, ₹16.3L, ₹45.7L). TOTAL RISK AMOUNT: ₹1.233Cr.
Tab switches to show client-level billing details.
Alert Finance — no row selected validation
1. Click 'Alert Finance' without selecting any row
Shows 'Selection Required' warning. Properly validates that at least one row must be selected.
Alert Finance — with row selected sends alerts
1. Select a row checkbox 2. Click 'Alert Finance' / 'Send Reminders'
'Alerts Sent' success message appears. Finance reminder sent for selected clients.
1. Click '.xlsx' button without selecting any row
Export validates that at least one row must be selected before download.
.xlsx Export — with row selected downloads file
Download triggers for selected billing data.
Search box accepts input and filters records.
List of API page loads with 85 APIs
1. Click Services > KYC > API > List of API
Page loads showing '85 of 85 APIs'. Table: API Code, API Name, API Details, Allocate button per row.
Results correctly filter to 9 PAN Verification APIs (CVS10001-CVS10009).
Modal opens to assign API to specific client with fields: Client selection, Credit limit, Rate per call.
Add API form loads with auto-generated code
Form loads with fields: API Code (auto: CVS100120), Group*, Product Name*, API Name*, API Description*, Input Parameters*, Output Fields*. Submit button at bottom.
1. Click 'Add API' submit with empty required fields
Form blocks empty submission. Required fields * marked.
Page shows volume-based allocation list with client assignments.
1. Click 'Back to Dashboard' on API list page
Successfully navigates back to main dashboard.
Input treated as plain text. No script execution. Shows 'No APIs found'.
Sidebar: Dashboard, Services > KYC > Clients (Onboarding/Manage) > Billing > API (List/Add/Manage Allocations) > Meta. Logout at bottom.
Chevron toggles between ▼ and ▲. KYC sub-item appears/disappears.
Expands to show Clients, Billing, API sub-menus with further nesting.
White 404 page: 'This page could not be found.' URL changes to /meta.
1. Toggle Services open 2. Toggle KYC open 3. Toggle another section 4. Observe positioning
Some menu items disappear or shift unpredictably when other sections are toggled. Need to re-click to restore.
1. Navigate to any sub-page 2. Click Dashboard
Dashboard link always visible and navigates correctly from any page.
1. Navigate to each page 2. Check sidebar highlight
Active page gets visual highlight (different background color) in sidebar.
1. Navigate from Dashboard > Onboarding Clients 2. Click browser back
Browser back button navigates correctly between pages.
Dashboard renders without authentication. No route guard.
CRITICAL: No auth middleware on routes
adminToken cookie with HttpOnly flag. Not accessible via document.cookie in JavaScript.
All search fields sanitize XSS payload. Treated as literal text.
SQL injection strings handled safely. Returns 'No results' or normal search behavior.
1. Login and wait extended period 2. No auto-logout observed
No session timeout. Sessions persist indefinitely.
'Hardcoded Administrative Access' visible to any visitor.
No CAPTCHA. Combined with no rate limiting, enables automated brute force.
Browser auto-fills credentials. No autocomplete='off' attribute.
No Content-Security-Policy header detected in responses.
Returns 404 Not Found. Endpoint does not exist.
Returns 405 Method Not Allowed. Only POST accepted.
Returns 405 Method Not Allowed. POST only.
Dark theme consistent across all pages
1. Navigate all pages and check theme
Login: dark navy gradient. Dashboard/inner pages: dark navy with neon-bordered cards. Consistent dark theme.
Billing page has light-theme cards vs dark-theme page
Billing summary cards use white/light backgrounds while page is dark. Contrast works well but differs from dashboard card styling.
Pie (Clients Status), Line (Monthly Onboarding), Bar (Plan Distribution) all render correctly with data.
No profile icon, no settings page, no user management.
Add API form has proper placeholder text
1. Check Add API form placeholder examples
Good placeholders: 'e.g., PAN Verification', 'e.g., Fetch PAN Lite', etc.
Newly created client persists after refresh
1. Add new client 2. Refresh page (F5) 3. Check if client still exists
Clients persist after page refresh. Data stored server-side.
1. Edit client name 2. Refresh page 3. Check if edit persists
Edited data persists across page refreshes.
1. Check browser Application > Cookies 2. Look for adminToken
adminToken cookie stores bearer token. HttpOnly flag prevents JS access.
1. Navigate between pages 2. Check load times
All pages load within 1-2 seconds. SSR-based architecture provides fast initial render.
1. Navigate to Manage Clients 2. Observe chart rendering
Pie, Line, and Bar charts render within 1 second of page load.
